outlook.volatilityExpectation: Positive aggregate GEX (0.28B) suppresses volatility; breakout potential above 660 resistance.
outlook.summary: Extreme PCR (>20 Monthly, >9 Weekly) with reverse_smirk skew indicates contrarian bullish setup. Price oscillating between 650 RESONANCE support and 660 Weekly Max Pain. Dealers long gamma stabilizes market near gamma flip.

levels.motivazione: Massive put OI across all three expiries (46.8K 0DTE + 15.3K Weekly + 76.3K Monthly). Coincides with 0DTE Max Pain - ultimate dealer defense zone.
Colossal put OI in Weekly (129K) and Monthly (132K). Deep structural support - extreme bearish positioning creates floor.
Weekly Max Pain level. High OI on both calls (18K) and puts (20K) in Weekly plus Monthly puts (26.5K). Key upside magnet.
Strong put concentration in Weekly (23K) and Monthly (100K). Secondary structural support zone.
Significant put OI in 0DTE (35.8K) and Monthly (36.5K). Near-term dealer hedging zone.
0DTE gamma equilibrium point. Spot (655.24) hovering directly at flip - directional catalyst zone.
Extreme volume activity (73.3K vol vs 8.6K OI = 8.5x ratio). Immediate friction above spot.
Dominant 0DTE call OI (14.2K). Hard resistance ceiling for upside extension.
Large Monthly put OI (30.5K) above spot. Dealer delta hedging creates resistance at this level.
Weekly put wall (12.8K OI) with Monthly confluence (117K). Extreme put skew protection zone.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive aggregate GEX suppresses movement.
outlook.summary: Market is pinned at the multi-expiry Gamma Flip resonance (584). Aggregate positive GEX (~2.6B) indicates dealers are long gamma, actively suppressing volatility. Price is likely to mean-revert around the 581-585 zone unless spot decisively breaks the 580 support.

levels.motivazione: Spot aligns with Gamma Flip across 0DTE, Weekly, and Monthly expiries. The precise convergence of structural equilibrium points creates a powerful pinning force.
Major resistance in 0DTE (41k OI) and Monthly (37k OI). Coincides with Monthly Max Pain, acting as a magnet for upward flows but a hard cap for rallies.
Massive Put OI in 0DTE (23.8k) and Monthly (32k). Close proximity to 0DTE Max Pain (581) creates a high-gravity support zone.
Magnetic level for today's expiry. With spot hovering above, dealers may sell shares to pin price here, counteracting the bearish volume skew.
Significant structural support defined by heavy Put Open Interest in Monthly (40k) and 0DTE (16k). Acts as the 'floor' for the current uptrend.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: EXTREME: Combined GEX -2.39B creates volatility amplification. Monthly gamma flip at spot creates directional breakout risk.
outlook.summary: Critical inflection at monthly gamma flip (23750). Extremely negative total GEX (-2.39B) indicates dealers short gamma across all expirations - expect accelerated moves. Bearish smirk skew (1.23-1.77) confirms put demand. Monthly PCR 2.57 shows extreme pessimism. Max pain above spot suggests MM pin risk higher, but negative gamma dominates near-term price action.

levels.motivazione: Monthly gamma equilibrium point. Spot within 0.05%. Negative GEX amplifies breakout potential. Dealers flip hedging behavior here.
Weekly max pain 0.16% above spot. MM target zone. Attracts price toward equilibrium in negative gamma environment.
Monthly 221 PUT OI. First resistance above spot. Dealers short puts require selling hedge on approach.
0DTE 486 PUT OI + Weekly 543 CALL OI. Both create dealer selling pressure. 0DTE Max Pain level.
Monthly 245 CALL OI, Monthly Max Pain. Major resistance. Dealers cap upside hedging.
0DTE 322 PUT OI (732 VOL - high activity) + Weekly 208 PUT OI. Strong support confluence. Vol/OI 2.27x indicates unusual activity.
0DTE 680 PUT OI (highest) + Monthly 111 PUT OI. Maximum put concentration. Deep support in sell-off.
0DTE 142 CALL OI + Weekly 202 CALL OI. Upper resistance band. Dealers cap rallies here.
